title: Agent
description: A registered execution provider. An Agent declares Capabilities, receives Tasks, executes them, and returns Artifacts. Invariants 1, 5, 6.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this document. Follows Semantic Versioning.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by the Runtime on registration.

name.description: Human-readable Agent name. Not used for dispatch.

capabilities.description: Capabilities declared by this Agent at registration.

endpoint.description: Network endpoint. Required for HTTP/gRPC Agents; null for stdio Agents.

protocol.description: Communication protocol supported by this Agent.

protocol_version.description: Runtime API protocol version this Agent implements.

heartbeat_interval_ms.description: Interval between heartbeat messages. Runtime-assigned at registration.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Maximum concurrent Tasks this Agent can execute.

current_tasks.description: Number of Tasks currently in-flight on this Agent.

current_task_ids.description: IDs of Tasks currently assigned to this Agent.

last_heartbeat_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent heartbeat. Null if never connected.
